rationale: logstable.spec.js tests user-driven field management (add/remove/persist); logspage.spec.js covers general logs page smoke; logsquickmode.spec.js was updated to be FTS-compatible but does not test the auto-pick behavior. No existing spec verifies the core behavior: that navigating to logs with no prior column selection automatically renders an FTS text column instead of the generic 'source' column. The FTS default-column feature is a distinct system behavior, not a user action, and requires its own spec in the Logs-Core group.
